mission.title: kubevirt: Mark `Virtiofs` field in `FIlesystem` as `omitempty` to allow non-virtiofsd vhost devices
mission.description: Mark `Virtiofs` field in `FIlesystem` as `omitempty` to allow non-virtiofsd vhost devices. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current kubevirt deployment
steps.description:
Verify your kubevirt version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
helm list -n kubevirt 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working kubevirt installation.

steps.title: Review kubevirt configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
kubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt
```
We're having our own CSI driver providing socket for `vhost-user-fs` protocol and we'd like to be able to not to start unused virtiofsd container by kubevirt. We're using sidecar to inject our filesystem device settings in domain XML.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Mark `Virtiofs` field in `FIlesystem` as `omitempty` toÔÇª
steps.description:
Before this PR:
We're having our own CSI driver providing socket for vhost-user-fs protocol and we'd like to be able to not to start unused virtiofsd container by kubevirt. We're using sidecar to inject our filesystem device settings in domain XML. Unfortunately, despite being a pointer to struct Virtiofs field is not marked with omitempty, so not setting this one can be properly seriali

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
kubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Mark `Virtiofs` field in `FIlesystem` as `omitempty` toÔÇª" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: The fix is in progress but not yet merged. PR #14110 was closed without merge. The replacement PR #16413 is still open and tracks the fix for marking the Virtiofs field as omitempty to allow non-virtiofsd vhost devices.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kubevirt installed or the issue environment reproducible.
